title: Nickel Gains Despite Looming Wave Of Supply
section_path: Nickel Gains Despite Looming Wave Of Supply
section_path_text: Nickel Gains Despite Looming Wave Of Supply
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Markets remained range bound as the post-FOMC rally petered out on a stronger USD. Doubts on the strength of China's reopening weighed on sentiment. Copper was up early in the session as part of the risk-on rally after the market perceived Chair Powell's comments following the FOMC meeting as dovish.
